emails_en.subject: Quick question about your team's Ontop experience
emails_en.preview: 8 questions that will help us make Ontop more useful for your workers — takes 5 minutes.
emails_en.body:
Hi [HR Contact Name],

I've been reviewing how your team is using Ontop, and I want to be straight with you: most of your workers haven't activated any financial products yet.

That means they're leaving real money on the table. Zero-fee international payments, savings tools, and financial flexibility that's already included in their contract but sitting unused.

Before I assume I know why, I'd rather ask you directly. You know your team better than anyone.

I put together 8 short questions. Your answers will shape exactly what we do next so we're not guessing and your workers aren't missing out.

Takes about 5 minutes. Answers below or reply however works for you.

Looking forward to it.

Luis Miguel
Your Ontop CSM
emails_en.legal: No worker personal data is requested. All questions are about team-level behavior and communication preferences only.
emails_en.raw:
SUBJECT: Quick question about your team's Ontop experience
PREVIEW: 8 questions that will help us make Ontop more useful for your workers — takes 5 minutes.
---
Hi [HR Contact Name],

I've been reviewing how your team is using Ontop, and I want to be straight with you: most of your workers haven't activated any financial products yet.

That means they're leaving real money on the table. Zero-fee international payments, savings tools, and financial flexibility that's already included in their contract but sitting unused.

Before I assume I know why, I'd rather ask you directly. You know your team better than anyone.

I put together 8 short questions. Your answers will shape exactly what we do next so we're not guessing and your workers aren't missing out.

Takes about 5 minutes. Answers below or reply however works for you.

Looking forward to it.

Luis Miguel
Your Ontop CSM

---

**DIAGNOSTIC QUESTIONS — Yango Workers · Ontop Financial Products**

1. **Awareness:** Have your workers been formally introduced to the Ontop financial products available to them (Ontop Card, Future Fund)? If yes, through what channel?

2. **Onboarding friction:** In your experience, do workers complete the Ontop app setup fully after receiving their contract? Or do most stop at payment setup only?

3. **Communication preference:** What channel reaches your workers most reliably right now? (WhatsApp, company email, team chat, in-person, other)

4. **Language and clarity:** Are there workers who may have difficulty navigating the app in English? Is language a barrier to activation?

5. **Trust and perception:** Have you heard any concerns or skepticism from workers about Ontop's financial products? (e.g. fees, security, "what's the catch")

6. **Timing:** Is there a moment in the month when workers are most receptive to financial information? (e.g. right after payday, before payday)

7. **Influence:** Who do workers tend to trust for financial or work-related guidance on your team? Is there an informal leader or point of contact?

8. **Barriers we haven't covered:** In your opinion, what is the single biggest reason a worker on your team hasn't activated their Ontop Card or savings products yet?

---

CTA: Reply with your answers
LEGAL_NOTE: No worker personal data is requested. All questions are about team-level behavior and communication preferences only.

emails_en.body: Hi [Name], it's Luis Miguel from Ontop. I sent you an email with 8 quick questions about your team. Worth 5 min — helps us make sure no one's missing out on what they already have access to. Did it land in your inbox? 👋
emails_en.raw: Hi [Name], it's Luis Miguel from Ontop. I sent you an email with 8 quick questions about your team. Worth 5 min — helps us make sure no one's missing out on what they already have access to. Did it land in your inbox? 👋

emails_en.body: Following up on that email, [Name]. Your workers have financial tools available right now that most haven't activated yet. Your answers help us fix that fast. Can you take a look today? 🙏
emails_en.raw: Following up on that email, [Name]. Your workers have financial tools available right now that most haven't activated yet. Your answers help us fix that fast. Can you take a look today? 🙏

emails_es.subject: Pregunta rápida sobre tus workers en Ontop
emails_es.preview: Llevo semanas revisando los datos y hay algo que quiero confirmar contigo antes de actuar.
emails_es.body:
Hola [Nombre],

Revisando el uso de la plataforma en el equipo de Yango, noto que la gran mayoría de sus workers aún no ha activado ningún beneficio financiero disponible para ellos: cero comisiones en compras internacionales, rendimiento sobre su saldo, adelanto de pago, entre otros.

Esto me preocupa porque cada mes que pasa sin activación es dinero que sus workers están dejando sobre la mesa. Y cuando los trabajadores no perciben valor de la plataforma, el riesgo de deserción sube.

Antes de diseñar cualquier comunicación hacia ellos, necesito entender el contexto desde tu lado. Son solo 8 preguntas. Te toma menos de 10 minutos.

**Las preguntas:**

1. ¿Los workers reciben actualmente alguna comunicación directa de Ontop, o todo pasa por HR?
2. ¿Hay restricciones internas para que Ontop les escriba directamente por email o WhatsApp?
3. ¿Qué canal usan más los workers para recibir novedades del trabajo: email corporativo, WhatsApp personal, grupo de Telegram, otro?
4. ¿Saben los workers que tienen una Ontop Card disponible y que no tiene comisión en compras internacionales?
5. ¿Has escuchado alguna queja o comentario de workers sobre pagos, conversión de divisas o acceso a su dinero?
6. ¿Hay algún grupo o perfil de workers con necesidades distintas: por país, por seniority, por tipo de contrato?
7. ¿Existe alguna figura interna (líder de equipo, community manager) que tenga más llegada con los workers que el canal oficial de HR?
8. ¿Qué nos ha faltado a nosotros como plataforma para que la adopción haya sido baja hasta ahora?

Con estas respuestas puedo armar una comunicación que tenga sentido real para tu equipo, no mensajes genéricos que nadie abre.

¿Podemos agendar 20 minutos esta semana, o prefieres responderme por aquí?

Luis Miguel
Customer Success Manager, Ontop
emails_es.cta: Agendar llamada o responder por escrito
emails_es.legal: Ninguna restricción crítica aplica a este email. Es comunicación CSM-HR, no copy directo a workers.

emails_en.subject: Your Ontop Card is ready to activate
emails_en.preview: Every time you pay abroad without activating it, you're leaving money on the table.
emails_en.body:
[First Name],

You're getting paid through Ontop, but you're still paying foreign transaction fees every time you swipe a card that isn't yours.

That's money out of your pocket. On every purchase. Every month.

Your Ontop Card is already waiting for you. It costs nothing to activate, and from the moment you do, you pay zero foreign transaction fees on every transaction.

No annual fee. No hidden charges. Just your money working the way it should.

Most of your Nebius colleagues who activated it did so in under two minutes. The ones who haven't are still paying fees they don't need to.

Two minutes now. Zero fees from here on.

Hit the button below and activate your card today.

Luis Miguel, your Ontop CSM
emails_en.legal: Ontop Card standalone does not include cashback. Zero foreign transaction fees apply to card purchases.

emails_en.subject: Still paying transaction fees?
emails_en.preview: Your colleagues stopped. Here's what changed for them.
emails_en.body:
[First Name],

A few days ago I let you know your Ontop Card was ready. I want to make this concrete.

Every purchase you make with a standard card abroad includes a fee. It's small each time. It adds up fast.

Workers at Nebius who activated their Ontop Card stopped paying those fees entirely. Same salary. Same purchases. Less taken out every month.

There's no catch. The card is free to activate. There's no annual fee. Zero foreign transaction fees is the default, not a promotion.

You're already on Ontop. The card is part of what you have access to. Not using it just means you're paying fees you could be avoiding right now.

Takes two minutes. Activation is one click.

Luis Miguel, your Ontop CSM
emails_en.legal: Ontop Card standalone does not include cashback. Zero foreign transaction fees apply to card purchases.

emails_en.subject: Last nudge on this, [First Name]
emails_en.preview: The fees aren't stopping. Your card still hasn't moved.
emails_en.body:
[First Name],

I'll keep this short.

You've had access to zero foreign transaction fees for over a week. Every day you haven't activated your Ontop Card is a day you've paid fees you didn't need to.

That's not a scare tactic. That's just math.

Your Ontop Card is free. Activation takes two minutes. The fees stop the moment you turn it on.

Several of your Nebius colleagues already made the switch. The difference shows up in their balance every single month.

One click. That's all that's between you and zero fees going forward.

Luis Miguel, your Ontop CSM

emails_es.subject: Tu Ontop Card está lista, [Nombre]
emails_es.preview: Cada compra fuera de tu país te está costando más de lo que crees. Actívala hoy sin costo.
emails_es.body:
[Nombre], cada vez que usas otra tarjeta para pagar en el extranjero o en moneda extranjera, el banco te cobra un fee de conversión. Puede parecer pequeño. Sumado al año, no lo es.

Tu Ontop Card no cobra nada por eso. Cero fees en transacciones internacionales. Sin letra pequeña.

Ya está disponible para ti. Solo necesitas activarla.

Un paso. Menos de dos minutos.

Tus colegas que ya la usan dejan de perder ese dinero en cada compra. Tú puedes hacer lo mismo hoy.

Luis Miguel
Tu CSM en Ontop

emails_es.subject: ¿Cuánto perdiste en fees este mes?
emails_es.preview: Tus colegas ya dejaron de pagarlo. Aquí te mostramos cómo.
emails_es.body:
[Nombre], cuando pagas con una tarjeta normal en otra moneda, el fee de conversión suele estar entre el 1.5% y el 3% por transacción. No lo ves en el momento. Aparece después, en silencio.

Con la Ontop Card ese cobro no existe.

No es un descuento. Es dinero que simplemente deja de salir de tu bolsillo en cada compra internacional.

Varios de tus colegas ya activaron su tarjeta y llevan semanas sin pagar esos fees. La diferencia se nota.

El proceso toma menos de dos minutos. Y no tiene costo.

¿Qué estás esperando?

Luis Miguel
Tu CSM en Ontop

emails_en.subject: Your money is losing ground every day
emails_en.preview: You're already using Ontop. Here's what you're leaving on the table.
emails_en.body:
[First Name],

Every day you keep your earnings sitting idle, they lose value.

You're already on Ontop. But right now, your balance isn't working for you. It's not earning interest. And every international purchase you make is still being taxed by hidden fees.

Workers like you on Ontop have already fixed both of those things with two moves: activating the Ontop Card and putting their savings into Future Fund.

Zero foreign transaction fees on every purchase. Plus interest rates up to 4% APR on your balance, with two options that fit how you save.

It takes less than 5 minutes to set up. The cost of waiting? Real money you won't get back.

Your next step is right here.

Luis Miguel, your Ontop CSM
emails_en.legal: Future Fund eligibility subject to confirmation. Present both options: Flex (3% APR, flexible withdrawal) and +30 (4% APR, 30-day lock).

emails_en.subject: Real numbers. Real workers. Real savings.
emails_en.preview: Here's exactly what two Ontop products can do for your balance.
emails_en.body:
[First Name],

Let's make this concrete.

Say you keep $2,000 in Future Fund +30. At 4% APR, that's $80/year in interest you'd otherwise have zero chance of earning sitting in a regular account.

Add the Ontop Card. Every international purchase you made last month? Those foreign transaction fees are now gone. Completely.

Workers at companies like yours are already doing this. Not because it's complicated. Because it isn't.

You don't need to change how you work or how you spend. You activate two products, and your money starts doing more on its own.

The only thing that changes if you wait? The interest you didn't earn. The fees you already paid.

Two steps. Under five minutes.

Luis Miguel, your Ontop CSM
emails_en.legal: Always present both Future Fund options: Flex (3% APR, flexible) and +30 (4% APR, 30-day lock). Worker chooses based on their preference.

emails_en.subject: Still sitting on this, [First Name]?
emails_en.preview: A quick reminder of what's been accumulating while you wait.
emails_en.body:
[First Name],

Quick math.

Every month you wait to activate Future Fund, you lose roughly one month of interest on your balance. At 4% APR on $2,000, that's about $6.70 you simply won't recover.

Small number. But it's yours, and right now it's going nowhere.

Meanwhile, your Ontop Card is still unactivated. That means every international transaction still costs you in fees that should already be zero.

Most Nebius workers who activated both products said the same thing afterward: they wished they'd done it sooner.

You're one step away. Choose the Future Fund option that fits your rhythm. Flex if you want flexibility. +30 if you want the higher rate.

Either way, start today.

Luis Miguel, your Ontop CSM
emails_en.legal: Future Fund eligibility must be confirmed before send. Do not deploy Email 3 without verifying worker qualifies for Future Fund.

emails_es.subject: Tu dinero está parado. Esto lo cambia.
emails_es.preview: Cada semana sin Future Fund es interés que no estás ganando. Un paso y listo.
emails_es.body:
[First Name], tienes tu cuenta Ontop activa. Bien. Pero hay algo que probablemente no estás haciendo: hacer que ese dinero trabaje mientras esperas tu próximo pago.

Con Future Fund puedes elegir lo que mejor te funciona:

**Flex:** 3% APR, retiras cuando quieres.
**+30:** 4% APR, bloqueas 30 días y ganas más.

Dos de tus colegas en Nebius ya lo activaron este mes. Cada día que lo dejas para después es interés que se queda sin ganar. No es complicado de calcular.

Un clic y eliges tu opción. No hay letra pequeña.

Luis Miguel, tu CSM en Ontop

emails_es.subject: ¿Cuánto perdiste en fees el mes pasado?
emails_es.preview: Si compraste en dólares o pagaste algo en otra moneda, la respuesta te va a molestar.
emails_es.body:
[First Name], una pregunta directa: ¿cuánto te cobró tu banco por compras en moneda extranjera el mes pasado?

El promedio es entre 3% y 5% por transacción. En un mes normal de gastos, eso son decenas de dólares que se van sin que te des cuenta.

La Ontop Card no te cobra nada por transacciones en el extranjero. Cero. Y la tienes disponible hoy.

Tus colegas que ya la activaron dejaron de pagar esos fees desde el primer uso. Tú todavía los estás pagando.

Actívala en menos de dos minutos. No hay costo de activación.

Luis Miguel, tu CSM en Ontop
emails_es.legal: Ontop Card standalone: solo zero foreign transaction fees. No mencionar cashback. Sin Reserve no hay cashback.

emails_es.subject: Último aviso: esto cierra la brecha
emails_es.preview: Ya tienes la cuenta. Ya tienes acceso. Solo falta un paso para no seguir perdiendo dinero.
emails_es.body:
[First Name], te escribí dos veces porque creo que vale la pena.

Tienes acceso a dos herramientas que la mayoría de workers remotos no tiene: una tarjeta sin fees internacionales y un fondo que te genera interés real sobre tu saldo.

La mayoría de tus colegas que los activaron tardó menos de tres minutos. El que más dudó me dijo después: "Ojalá lo hubiera hecho antes."

Cada mes que pasa sin activarlos es un mes de fees pagados y de interés no ganado. Ya sabes lo que pierdes. Ahora sabes cómo pararlo.

¿Empezamos?

Luis Miguel, tu CSM en Ontop

emails_en.subject: Your card is ready. Most don't use it.
emails_en.preview: Every time you pay abroad without it, you're leaving money on the table.
emails_en.body:
[First Name],

Every international purchase you make without your Ontop Card has a cost. Foreign transaction fees, conversion markups, hidden charges. They add up faster than you'd think.

Your Ontop Card is already available to you. Zero foreign transaction fees. Every time you swipe abroad, what you see is what you pay.

Your colleagues who activated it stopped thinking about fees on international purchases. You can do the same today in a few minutes.

One tap to activate. No paperwork. No waiting.

The fees you paid last month won't come back. But the ones next month? Those are still yours to keep.
emails_en.legal: Zero foreign transaction fees applies to card transactions. No cashback feature is included without an active Reserve membership.
emails_en.raw:
SUBJECT: Your card is ready. Most don't use it.
PREVIEW: Every time you pay abroad without it, you're leaving money on the table.
---
[First Name],

Every international purchase you make without your Ontop Card has a cost. Foreign transaction fees, conversion markups, hidden charges. They add up faster than you'd think.

Your Ontop Card is already available to you. Zero foreign transaction fees. Every time you swipe abroad, what you see is what you pay.

Your colleagues who activated it stopped thinking about fees on international purchases. You can do the same today in a few minutes.

One tap to activate. No paperwork. No waiting.

The fees you paid last month won't come back. But the ones next month? Those are still yours to keep.
---
CTA: Activate my Ontop Card
LEGAL_NOTE: Zero foreign transaction fees applies to card transactions. No cashback feature is included without an active Reserve membership.

emails_en.subject: What are you paying on every purchase?
emails_en.preview: Your card eliminates one of the most common fees workers like you forget to check.
emails_en.body:
[First Name],

Foreign transaction fees are easy to ignore. They show up as small percentages on your statement and most people never question them.

Here is the problem. On every international purchase, those fees can run between 1.5% and 3%. On a $500 purchase, that is up to $15 gone. Every single time.

Workers at Yango who activated their Ontop Card stopped paying that. It costs nothing to activate. The card is already part of your account.

You are not getting a worse deal by activating it. You are getting a worse deal by not.

Takes two minutes. No forms. Just activate and start using it on your next purchase.
emails_en.legal: Foreign transaction fee elimination applies to eligible card transactions. No cashback without Reserve membership.

emails_en.subject: Last call: your card is still sitting there
emails_en.preview: One click separates you from zero fees on every international purchase. That's it.
emails_en.body:
[First Name],

Quick one.

Your Ontop Card has been available for a while now and it is not activated yet.

Every purchase you make internationally without it is a purchase where you paid fees you did not have to.

Most of your colleagues at Yango have already made the switch. They are not doing anything different. They just activated.

This is the last nudge. After this, the fees keep coming out of your pocket on every transaction.

Two minutes. One tap. Done.

emails_es.subject: Cada compra en el extranjero te está costando de más
emails_es.preview: Tus colegas ya dejaron de pagar fees innecesarios. Tú también puedes.
emails_es.body:
[First Name], cada vez que usas otra tarjeta para pagar en moneda extranjera, pierdes entre 2% y 3% de tu propio dinero en fees de conversión.

No es un monto pequeño. En un año, eso puede ser cientos de dólares que simplemente desaparecen.

Tu Ontop Card elimina esos cargos por transacciones internacionales. Cero fees. Cada compra, siempre.

Workers como tú en Yango ya la activaron y dejaron de regalar dinero en cada pago.

El único paso es activarla. No hay costos de apertura, no hay letra chica.

Un clic y empieza a proteger lo que ganaste.
emails_es.legal: La Ontop Card standalone ofrece cero fees por transacciones internacionales. El cashback aplica únicamente con membresía Reserve activa, no incluida en este plan.

emails_es.subject: ¿Cuánto perdiste en fees este mes?
emails_es.preview: La cifra exacta puede sorprenderte. Aquí te lo explicamos.
emails_es.body:
[First Name], hagamos la cuenta rápida.

Si gastaste $500 en compras internacionales este mes con otra tarjeta, pagaste hasta $15 en fees que no tenías por qué pagar.

En seis meses: $90. En un año: más de $180. Dinero tuyo, cobrado sin que lo notes.

Con tu Ontop Card esa cifra es cero. Siempre.

Varios de tus colegas ya activaron la suya y cada mes retienen ese dinero en su bolsillo. No lo donaron a un banco.

La tarjeta ya está disponible para ti. Solo falta que la actives.

No pierdas otro mes pagando de más por algo que ya tienes resuelto.

emails_en.subject: You're leaving money on the table
emails_en.preview: Every purchase you made this month could have earned you something back.
emails_en.body:
[First Name], you've been using Ontop long enough to know how it works.

But here's what most workers don't realize until someone tells them: every dollar you spend internationally is a dollar that could be earning cashback. Right now, it isn't.

Ontop Reserve unlocks 10% cashback on qualifying purchases and 5% on everything else. For someone spending $300/month abroad, that's real money left uncollected every single month you wait.

Your card is already in your wallet. Reserve is the switch that makes it work harder.

One activation. No complicated steps.
emails_en.legal: Reserve membership is $14.90/month. Cashback applies to qualifying purchases per Ontop's current terms. Confirm eligibility in-app before activating.
emails_en.raw:
SUBJECT: You're leaving money on the table
PREVIEW: Every purchase you made this month could have earned you something back.
---
[First Name], you've been using Ontop long enough to know how it works.

But here's what most workers don't realize until someone tells them: every dollar you spend internationally is a dollar that could be earning cashback. Right now, it isn't.

Ontop Reserve unlocks 10% cashback on qualifying purchases and 5% on everything else. For someone spending $300/month abroad, that's real money left uncollected every single month you wait.

Your card is already in your wallet. Reserve is the switch that makes it work harder.

One activation. No complicated steps.

CTA: Activate Reserve now
LEGAL_NOTE: Reserve membership is $14.90/month. Cashback applies to qualifying purchases per Ontop's current terms. Confirm eligibility in-app before activating.

emails_en.subject: Workers using Reserve don't look back
emails_en.preview: Here's what actually changes when you turn it on.
emails_en.body:
[First Name], a quick follow-up because this is worth saying plainly.

Workers who activate Reserve consistently tell us the same thing: they wish they'd done it sooner.

The math is straightforward. At $14.90/month, Reserve pays for itself the moment your cashback on international spending crosses that threshold. After that, everything else is yours.

10% back on qualifying purchases. 5% on the rest. Month after month, automatically.

The workers who don't activate it aren't saving money. They're spending the same amount and getting nothing back for it.

You've already built the habit of using Ontop. Reserve just rewards you for it.
emails_en.legal: Cashback rates apply to qualifying purchases per Ontop's current terms. $14.90/month membership fee applies.

emails_es.subject: Tu Ontop Card puede hacer más por ti
emails_es.preview: Hay un beneficio que ya tienes disponible y que probablemente no estás usando.
emails_es.body:
Hola [First Name],

Cada vez que usas tu Ontop Card en el extranjero, ahorras en comisiones. Eso ya lo sabes.

Lo que quizás no sabes: hay workers de Yango que además reciben hasta 10% de cashback en sus compras con tarjeta, cada mes.

La diferencia es Reserve, nuestra membresía mensual diseñada para quienes ya usan Ontop de forma activa, exactamente como tú.

Por $14.99 al mes recuperas ese costo con una sola compra mediana. Todo lo que gastes de ahí en adelante genera retorno real.

Sin Reserve, cada compra es dinero que se va sin volver. Con Reserve, cada compra trabaja para ti.

¿Quieres ver cuánto podrías estar recuperando?

Luis Miguel
Tu CSM en Ontop
emails_es.legal: Reserve disponible exclusivamente para usuarios activos de Ontop Card con historial de uso calificado.

emails_es.subject: ¿Cuánto cashback dejaste ir este mes?
emails_es.preview: Tus compras ya ocurrieron. La pregunta es si te generaron retorno.
emails_es.body:
Hola [First Name],

Piénsalo así: si gastaste $300 este mes con tu Ontop Card, sin Reserve ese dinero simplemente se fue.

Con Reserve activo, hasta $30 habrían vuelto a tu bolsillo. Automáticamente.

Workers de Yango que activaron Reserve recuperan el costo de la membresía en días, no en meses. El resto del mes es ganancia neta sobre lo que ya iban a gastar de todas formas.

No te pido que gastes más. Te propongo que lo que ya gastas empiece a trabajar para ti.

Cada mes sin Reserve es un mes de compras sin retorno. Y eso no cambia solo.

El siguiente paso toma menos de dos minutos.

Luis Miguel
Tu CSM en Ontop
